title: SlotEntry
description: Universal envelope around any slot's payload. Carries the time anchor (scheduled_for), the compute receipt (computed_at + computed_by), the status, and audit info. Payload is slot-specific and validated against its own schema.

status.description: scheduled = future, not yet computed. computing = worker claimed. fresh = computed < ttl/3. aging = computed within ttl. stale = past ttl, still rendered with warning. missed = scheduled_for + ttl past, no compute attempt. errored = last attempt failed, retry_after_ms set. abstained = intentional skip with reason. degraded = computed but with missing prior slot input.

scheduled_for.description: When the slot SHOULD have been computed by. Set by scheduler/calendar.ts. Bumped forward by event hooks (sleep_complete bumps night_review.scheduled_for to event time).

ttl_ms.description: Time after scheduled_for during which the slot stays fresh→aging. Past ttl_ms the slot flips to stale. Per-slot constant; written here for client convenience.

payload.description: Slot-specific JSON. Validated against the per-slot payload schema in v4/schemas/slot-<id>.schema.json. Null when status ∈ {scheduled, computing, missed, errored} and no prior payload exists.

request_count.description: How many times this slot has been (re)computed for this period. Increments on every release.

version.description: Monotonic version of this SlotEntry. Bumped on every atomic write. Used for CAS by the Pi writer when merging diffs.
